description: Diff Integrity and Scope: Detect mixed concerns, incomplete changesets, and scope creep.

fixtures.notes: Single PR bundles a performance optimisation (dedup schema dumps) with an unrelated internal refactoring of dump_schema to use with_temporary_pool, and separately refactors the test helper include.
PR title explicitly says "Refactor READ_QUERY AND fix missing arguments" — a structural refactor (extracting DEFAULT_READ_QUERY) is bundled with a bug fix (adding missing SQL keywords per adapter).

A single PR bundles two distinct concerns: a bug fix to SpringBeanContainer.java (removing incorrect name-to-type delegation, adding missing autowireBeanProperties call) alongside adding a brand-new 344-line integration test file.

Three unrelated concerns bundled together: (1) correcting a broken --frozen flag to --frozen-lockfile, (2) adding a new post-install lockfile integrity check, and (3) bumping dozens of yarn.lock dependency versions.
Schema-dedupe behavior changes are bundled with unrelated test-helper include churn in the same PR, increasing scope beyond a single cohesive objective.
